place: Lancaster County, Pennsylvania — Old Order Amish and Mennonite Plain communities (Strasburg)
palette: electric blue, barn red, muted ochre, weathered wood
cultural_anchors: horse‑drawn buggies; plain, dark Mennonite/Amish clothing and bonnets; hand‑crafted wooden furniture and quilts; simple utilitarian farm tools
environmental_anchors: red bank barns and white farmhouses amid rolling agricultural fields; clear, cold rural night skies with intermittent power/outage vulnerability
